case_title: MARY GRACE SALUDEZ et al VS. BOYE CHEN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALUDEZ, MARY GRACE MAGALONG, EMILYN AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, BOYE IRREAL, HANNAH DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-12-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-11-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-20-2014

ARBITRATOR WALTER CURTIS COOK APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-23-2015 THROUGH APR-23-2015.

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JAN-12-2015. THE NOV-12-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF JAN-23-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
